resultList.dtldesc: Embrace a life of comfort and exclusivity with this elegant 2 BHK villa nestled in the Senthan Green Park community in Beeramguda, Hyderabad. This gated community offers a secure and peaceful environment, making it an ideal choice for families seeking a private and sophisticated residence. The villa is part of a well-maintained development that prioritises green spaces and community living. Its strategic location in Beeramguda ensures a perfect balance between a tranquil suburban lifestyle and the convenience of being well-connected to Hyderabads major commercial and residential hubs.Property SpecificationsThis villa occupies a generous super area of 1500 sq. ft, providing ample room for a versatile and spacious layout. As an east-facing property, it is designed to capture natural morning light, creating a bright and airy atmosphere throughout the home. The residence features two well-proportioned bedrooms, two modern bathrooms, and a private balcony that overlooks a lush garden or park, as well as the main road. The unit is between 5 to 10 years old and is offered in an unfurnished condition, giving you the complete freedom to customise and style the interiors to your preference. The property is held under freehold ownership, ensuring a secure and long-term asset.FacilitiesThe villa is situated within a gated community that provides a comprehensive range of facilities for a safe and convenient lifestyle. Residents have access to dedicated parking spaces for both cars and bikes, ensuring the safety of their vehicles. The community infrastructure is robust, with well-lit internal roads and a focus on maintaining a clean and green environment. Being a ready-to-move property, it is equipped with essential water and electricity supplies. The secure perimeter and professional management of the Senthan Green Park community provide an added layer of safety and peace of mind for all residents.LocalityBeeramguda is a rapidly developing residential locality in North Hyderabad, known for its excellent connectivity and social infrastructure. The property is conveniently located near the Best IAS Coaching centre 0.4 kms and the Glodent Multispeciality Dental Hospital 0.5 kms. For shopping and daily essentials, the Venkateswara Organics Super Market is just 1.7 kms away. The area is well-serviced by public transport, providing easy access to Gachibowli, Tellapur, and other major parts of the city. With a variety of schools, hospitals, and retail centres in the immediate neighbourhood, Beeramguda offers a highly convenient and settled environment for modern families.

Ideal for families seeking a refined villa lifestyle in North Hyderabad, the property stands out for its spacious layout, established surroundings, and access to modern facilities within the society.Property SpecificationsThe villa is developed over a super built-up area of approximately 3,500 sq. ft with a carpet area of about 2,750 sq. ft and is arranged in a G1 configuration. Two balconies enhance ventilation and provide pleasant views of the internal lane road and adjoining park. The living and dining areas are combined, creating an open and functional layout suitable for both daily living and entertaining. The villa enjoys proximity to essential social infrastructure, with a supermarket located approximately 300 metres away, schools within about 1.5 km, and hospitals around 2 km from the property. The area is well-served by public transport and road networks, making daily commuting smooth and efficient. With its established residential character, access to amenities, and growing demand, this villa presents a compelling option for end-users seeking space, comfort, and long-term value in Kompally.

Presenting an exclusive opportunity to own a magnificent 4 BHK flat in this prestigious enclave, where every detail speaks of sophistication and fine living.::::::Property Specifications::::::Situated on the ground floor, this east-facing 4 BHK flat spans a spacious carpet area of 2790 sq ft, combining generous room dimensions with abundant natural light and ventilation. This ready-to-occupy residence features four air-conditioned bedrooms with fitted wardrobes, while three bedrooms include double beds for a relaxing ambiance. Adorned with premium granite flooring, each room exudes opulence and style, making it an ideal retreat for those with refined tastes.::::::The layout includes four western-style bathrooms with geysers, three of which are attached, while one serves as a common bath. In addition, a dedicated puja room, an expansive living-dining area with a 6-seater dining table, a 9-seater sofa, and two branded air conditioners add to the comfort and functionality of this home. The well-planned modular kitchen comes equipped with a cooking top, chimney, sink, and ample trolley storage, catering to all culinary needs.::::::Facilities::::::Residents of Studio Sycamore enjoy top-notch amenities, including two covered parking spots, a fully equipped gym, a clubhouse, and a community centre, alongside a kids' play area.
